transactions.desc: The Diamondbacks selected Cabrera's contract from Triple-A Reno to start Sunday's game versus the Twins.
The Athletics selected Meneses' contract from Triple-A Las Vegas, and he's batting sixth as the designated hitter Sunday against the Angels.
The Rangers recalled Corniell from Triple-A Round Rock on Sunday.
The Marlins selected Navarreto's contract from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Padres reinstated Andujar (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Marlins reinstated Conine (hamstring) from the 60-day injured list Sunday. He'll start in right field and bat second in the Marlins' series finale against the Giants.
The Marlins designated Morel for assignment Sunday.
The White Sox optioned Davis to Triple-A Charlotte on Sunday.
The White Sox reinstated Hicks (lat) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Twins reinstated Rojas (triceps) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
Minnesota designated Lawrence for assignment Sunday.
The Yankees recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre ahead of his scheduled start Sunday against the Reds in New York.
The Yankees reinstated Wells (headaches) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Dodgers recalled McDermott from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
Siani was recalled from Triple-A Norfolk on Saturday, Rich Dubroff of BaltimoreBaseball.com reports.
The Cubs designated Peralta for assignment Saturday, Bruce Levine of 670TheScore.com reports.
The Houston Astros traded RHP Jayden Murray to the Chicago Cubs.
The Arizona Diamondbacks traded INF Luis Urías to the Toronto Blue Jays.
The Red Sox recalled Seigler from Triple-A Worcester on Saturday.
The Yankees optioned Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Athletics recalled Hartlieb from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday, Martin Gallegos of MLB.com reports.
The Diamondbacks recalled Tawa from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Abner from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Yankees optioned Bird to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday, Bryan Hoch of MLB.com reports.
Washington cleared waivers Saturday and was sent outright to High-A Everett.
The Giants reinstated Oliva (wrist) from the 60-day injured list Saturday and designated him for assignment, Shayna Rubin of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.
The Blue Jays optioned Little to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Estrada (shoulder) from the injured list Saturday.
The Blue Jays optioned McAdoo to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Varsho (wrist) from the injured list Saturday.
